title: Fix AgentStatus type and mapping to support all server statuses
description: Expand AgentStatus from 'working' | 'idle' to include 'done', 'paused', 'error', and 'offline'. Fix toAgentStatus() mapping, priority map, and all consumers.

scope.in: AgentStatus type expansion, toAgentStatus mapping fix, priority map fix, sprite entries, statusBadgeVariant, StatusChip, chooseDestination, all consumer switch/case blocks
scope.out: Server-side aggregator changes (already correct), new animation frames, visual design changes

dod.criterion: AgentStatus type includes all 6 values: working, idle, done, paused, error, offline
toAgentStatus() correctly maps all 7 server statuses without collapsing
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Expand AgentStatus type and fix toAgentStatus mapping
tasks.user_scenario: When an agent finishes work or hits an error, the game shows the correct status instead of collapsing everything to 'idle'.
tasks.scope: Expand AgentStatus in pixel-types.ts to 'working' | 'idle' | 'done' | 'paused' | 'error' | 'offline'. Delete the duplicate type in types.ts and re-export from pixel-types.ts. Rewrite toAgentStatus() to map all 7 server statuses correctly. Fix the priority map to include all 6 statuses.

dod.criterion: AgentStatus in pixel-types.ts includes all 6 values: working, idle, done, paused, error, offline
No duplicate AgentStatus definition in types.ts — it re-exports from pixel-types.ts
toAgentStatus() maps all 7 server statuses correctly without collapsing
Priority map covers all 6 AgentStatus values with no missing keys
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Add sprite entries and update all consumer switch/case blocks
tasks.user_scenario: Agents in the game render the correct status icon sprite and UI badge color for every possible status, with no unhandled cases.
tasks.scope: Export the existing error/offline/paused/done sprite definitions in statusIcons.ts and add them to STATUS_ICON_SPRITES. Update statusBadgeVariant() for new statuses. Update StatusChip and chooseDestination. Verify no TypeScript exhaustiveness gaps remain.

dod.criterion: STATUS_ICON_SPRITES has entries for all 6 AgentStatus values
statusBadgeVariant() returns distinct variants for done, paused, error, and offline
chooseDestination handles all 6 statuses without falling through to a lossy default
npm run type-check passes with zero errors
No remaining references to the old two-value AgentStatus type anywhere in the codebase

sequencing_rationale: Task 1 establishes the canonical type, eliminates the duplicate, and fixes the core mapping logic. Task 2 builds on the expanded type to update all downstream consumers.
